title: Client onboarding kickoff and document request review
description: Weekly kickoff for newly signed bookkeeping and outsourced accounting clients. Lucia will walk through the standard document request list, expected handoff timing, and open intake blockers before work is assigned.

title: Monthly close capacity and assignment standup
description: Tuesday resourcing standup for the admin operations team supporting client closes. The team will balance reviewer bandwidth, month-end reconciliations, and open clean-up work across active engagements.

title: Tax pipeline review and partner escalation list
description: Weekly tax pipeline review covering return status, reviewer bottlenecks, and matters that need partner escalation before filing windows tighten. William White and Hannah Grant will flag any returns needing same-week return-review follow-up.

title: Compliance deadlines review and next-week risk scan
description: Friday compliance review of filing calendars, annual report slippage, and operational risks heading into the next week. The group will also check whether any client entities need catch-up support from the overdue annual report project.

title: Client onboarding kickoff and document request review
description: Recurring onboarding kickoff for newly won clients entering bookkeeping and advisory workflows. The session aligns document request status, ownership, and expected setup timing for accounting files and bank access.

title: Monthly close capacity and assignment standup
description: Weekly close planning huddle to assign month-end work and escalate staffing constraints early. The team will discuss review coverage and where trainee support can be used without slowing partner deadlines.

title: Tax pipeline review and partner escalation list
description: The tax group will review return progress, pending client questions, and items that may require partner sign-off. Discussion includes William White and Hannah Grant return-review threads before upcoming IRS submission windows.

title: Audit PBC backlog burn-down for retail client group
description: Ryan Delgado and the audit team will work through stale PBC requests and prioritize evidence needed to keep fieldwork moving. The discussion includes controls over engagement-confidential records vault access and limiting materials to the assigned client team.

title: Friday compliance deadlines review and next-week risk scan
description: Standing review of imminent compliance deadlines and any regulatory issues likely to affect next week's workload. Marina will highlight overdue entities requiring multistate annual report catch-up.

title: New starter onboarding checklist and access scheduling
description: HR and operations will coordinate laptop provisioning, workflow access, and first-week checklist steps for incoming hires. The team will also confirm HR-only handling boundaries for policy documents and employee files.

title: Multi-state annual report catch-up for overdue client entities
description: Project session focused on overdue state annual reports for client entities that slipped during peak filing season. The team will sort jurisdiction priorities, missing signatures, and legal follow-up needed to get filings current.

title: Accounts payable workflow standardization for managed clients
description: Operations review of standard AP approval routing, invoice coding expectations, and exception handling for managed clients. The team will reference pending approval on invoice VEN-019-583136 and approved status on VEN-029-817825 to align approval thresholds.

title: Team lunch coordination and birthday cake collection
description: Short planning call for the month-end team lunch and shared birthday cake collection. Margot will finalize headcount, dietary notes, and contribution reminders before Friday ordering.

title: Month-end client billing draft review and partner approval
description: Partner-led review of draft March client billing before invoices are finalized. The group will focus on realization questions, write-up consistency, and any billing holds tied to unresolved work in process balances.

title: Quarter-end engagement margin and write-off review
description: Q1 review of engagement margin trends, proposed write-offs, and jobs needing partner intervention before April billing. The discussion will include work in process pressure points and any impact from exception exc_abd8e711f5f347 awaiting approval.

title: Managing partner announces major multi-service client win
description: Steven Perry will brief team leads on a newly won client engagement spanning bookkeeping, tax, and compliance support. The call is intended to align intake timing, staffing expectations, and immediate onboarding responsibilities across service lines.

title: Legacy bookkeeping cleanup and opening balance remediation
description: Bookkeeping remediation session to clear legacy coding issues and validate opening balances before the next reporting cycle. The team will compare prior corrections against reconciliation items BL-3E4ED5B5B9BA and BL-0DEC7D2FD9E6 to avoid repeating archived variances.

title: Ryan Delgado records vault access restriction review
description: Administrative review to confirm engagement-confidential records vault access is limited to the assigned audit team. Ryan will walk through the revised permission matrix and exception handling for partner oversight access.

title: Anaya Wallace aged payables verification and Ben Arinzo correction handoff
description: Quarterly payables verification review to reconcile aged vendor items and transfer correcting entries to bookkeeping. The handoff includes follow-up on invoice VEN-040-991816 marked voided and invoice VEN-040-226456 marked paid so cleanup is reflected consistently.

title: William White and Hannah Grant return-review threads
description: Focused return-review checkpoint before IRS submission windows tighten. Hannah and William will compare reviewer notes, outstanding client questions, and any returns that may need escalation to Alex or Ming for same-day sign-off.

title: HR-only policy and employee file handling review
description: Clint Peterson and Rachel Green will reaffirm HR-only handling boundaries for policy files, employee records, and sensitive case materials. The session is meant to tighten routing rules before broader administrative onboarding activity resumes.

title: Internal company accounts questions manager-partner routing
description: Administrative reminder that internal company accounts questions should remain within the manager and partner circle. The group will confirm escalation routes for internal postings touching 101000 Cash - Operating and 110000 Accounts Receivable - Client Billings.

title: Senior accountant resignation during month-end close
description: Urgent leadership check-in after a senior accountant resigns in the middle of close activities. Managers will reassign client work, review continuity risks, and identify where trainee or partner cover is needed to protect filing deadlines.

title: Month-end client billing draft review and partner approval
description: April billing draft review to clear partner approvals before invoices are issued. Discussion will include whether any work should be held pending write-up support or close-out of unresolved exception exc_cb0a9a94a3084c awaiting approval.

title: Friday compliance deadlines review and next-week risk scan
description: Weekly compliance checkpoint focused on May filing dates, state notices, and next-week risk areas. The team will prioritize any late-appearing annual report and AML matters that could disrupt service teams.

title: Tax and advisory journal entry review
description: Cross-functional review of draft and submitted entries affecting current advisory work. The team will discuss JE-brookfield-FP-2026-05-0010, JE-northstar_legal-FP-2026-05-0002, and JE-acme_cloud-FP-2026-05-0002 to confirm reviewer expectations and timing.

title: Audit exception and reconciliation checkpoint
description: Audit and accounting checkpoint to review unusual recon variances and open exceptions influencing client support work. The agenda includes BL-8DCA6908E272, BL-0FBF66B45ED1, and high-urgency exception exc_abd8e711f5f347 for approval readiness.

title: New starter onboarding checklist and access scheduling
description: Second-cycle onboarding coordination for new hires joining operations and service teams. HR will verify access sequencing, confidentiality acknowledgements, and who owns first-week workflow training.

title: Accounts payable workflow standardization for managed clients
description: Follow-up AP standardization session focused on coding consistency and approval evidence across managed clients. The group will use invoice VEN-038-640565 and invoice VEN-027-477822 as examples of paid items that should be easy to trace through the workflow.

title: Team lunch coordination and birthday cake collection
description: Planning touchpoint for the spring team lunch and upcoming birthday cake collection. Margot and Jane will confirm catering, reimbursement handling, and final RSVP counts.

title: Month-end client billing draft review and partner approval
description: Final May billing draft review before month-end issuance and partner approval. The team will consider whether any cleanup tied to JE-brookfield-FP-2025-07-0027 or JE-brookfield-FP-2025-07-0002 still affects narrative support on client bills.

title: Brookfield April Close BD0 Kickoff
description: Andrea Phil opens the April close with George and Margaret, confirms George will post BD1 accruals, prepaid CPE amortization, and monthly depreciation, and sets Margaret's review deadline for end of BD2. The team is targeting period lock on May 5 so the management accounts package can move to partner sign-off immediately after.

title: BD0 Kickoff - May Close
description: Andrea Phil is setting the May close cadence and confirming that the team should follow the same clean pattern used in April. George will own BD1 close entries, Margaret will review by end of BD2, and the management accounts package should be ready for partner sign-off after the BD3 lock on June 3.

title: Northstar Legal BD0 Close Kickoff
description: Matthew Li is setting the May close cadence and ownership for Northstar Legal. Edith Banda will prepare the BD1 entries for expert-witness and co-counsel accruals, WIP recognition, CLE amortization, and depreciation; Daniel Jones reviews by BD2; BD3 lock is targeted for May 5 and the management accounts package is due to Matthew for BD6 sign-off.

title: Acme Cloud April Close BD0 Kickoff
description: Andrea is kicking off the April close and aligning owners and deadlines for the first week. Jones will prepare the BD1 deferred revenue release, deferred commissions amortization, and AWS/GCP accrual entries, Brenda will complete review by end of BD2, and the goal is to have the period locked by BD3 with the management accounts package ready for Andrea's BD6 sign-off.

title: Acme Cloud BD0 May Close Kickoff
description: Andrea Phil is setting expectations for the May close kickoff, including keeping the same cadence used in April, revisiting the Helix Bio unit-economics follow-through in the MAP, and holding to a BD3 lock target of June 3 with no gross margin surprises.

title: Northstar Legal FY2026 Y/E Audit  -  Engagement Kickoff
description: Julia Vance is convening the engagement kickoff to confirm audit scope, align on key reporting dates, set the materiality baseline, review the initial PBC request list, cover IOLTA trust-account testing, and obtain the signed engagement letter. Ryan Delgado should circulate the draft planning memo by 2026-05-26 so the team arrives aligned on approach and open items.

title: Northstar Q1 2026 Partner Reporting Review
description: Edith will walk through the executive summary, P&L variance commentary, IOLTA explainer, and the two Q1 adjusting JEs before Matthew signs off by email.

title: Acme Cloud FY2026 BO refresh kickoff
description: Daniel will pull the FY2025 BO file from records_vault, confirm ownership changes with Acme's CFO, re-rate AML risk, and route the package for partner sign-off before FY2026 audit fieldwork begins.

title: Northstar Legal FY2025 Annual Accounts Kickoff
description: Recurring kickoff for the FY2025 annual accounts cycle for Northstar Legal. George McAdam will handle Step 1 prep, Daniel Jones will complete Step 2 review, and Andrea Phil will perform Step 3 partner sign-off ahead of the client deliverable window targeted for 2026-05-22.

title: Acme change-order  -  partner negotiation slot (contingency)
description: Hold this slot for Andrea Phil and George McAdam in case the Acme CFO wants to negotiate before signing. Release it if the package is signed as sent; discussion would cover the same multi-state sales tax work for TX/GA/NC plus the AR-aging cleanup scope expansion.

title: Acme Cloud Q1 2026 AR Aging Review Kickoff
description: Recurring kickoff for the Acme Cloud quarterly AR aging review tied to FP-2026-03 close. Review account 120000 using the standard aging buckets of current, 1-30, 31-60, 61-90, and 90+; confirm any 60+ day customer concentrations, handoff timing to George McAdam for chase-letter drafting, and the route for the final client deliverable to the Acme CFO by 2026-04-15.

title: CrownPeak close-out and cancellation control gap sync
description: Review partner-approved close-out for the CrownPeak stale pre-bill, confirm status of the required credit-memo backfill, and discuss whether cancellation events should trigger an AP-side cross-check against pending items.

title: Northstar weekly recon review  -  May 2026 cycle
description: Daniel Jones convenes the weekly reconciliation review for the Northstar Legal May 2026 close. Top agenda item is BlackLine reconciliation BL-AA054D9F0898 for account 220000 in period northstar_legal_FP-2026-05, submitted balance $2,493,938.68, including the flagged $2.31 FX variance that must be cleared ahead of the 2026-06-05 partner sign-off deadline.

title: Brookfield Internal Recon Review - BL-516B536953DA / Acct 210000
description: Weekly internal review of reconciliation BL-516B536953DA for account 210000. Focus is the open May balance of $67,744.03, the $6,328.86 variance identified in Anaya's May FX refresh, and actions needed to stay on track for the 2026-06-05 partner sign-off deadline.

title: FY26 AML control-effectiveness review  -  wire-flag threshold calibration
description: We will review whether the current wire-transfer flag threshold remains appropriately calibrated for recurring enterprise settlement activity and use JE-acme_cloud-FP-2026-04-0052 as the reference case for policy discussion only. Pre-reads are the closed CLEAR monitoring file for JE-acme_cloud-FP-2026-04-0052, Farah's analyst memo, and acme_cloud Beneficial Owner File  -  AML BO registry.

title: FY26 Q1 partner-sign-off control test working session
description: Working session to walk the FY26 Q1 partner-sign-off control test around anchor reconciliation BL-A81316258BCB and confirm the five-recon sample set. Reference materials for discussion are Records Vault documents titled FY26 Q1 Partner Sign-Off Sample Pull Memo (kind: memo, retention: AICPA_SQMS_7Y) and FY26 Q1 Control Test Evidence Index (kind: reconciliation_evidence, retention: AUDIT_PCAOB_7Y). This session also pre-stages follow-up review touchpoints with Julia Vance and Peter Sanchez without changing any BlackLine or Records Vault record.

title: FY26 Q2 partner-sign-off control test
description: Quarterly partner-sign-off control test session for FY26 Q2 with the current-quarter methodology refinement carried forward: the sample design should intentionally include one near-boundary certifier case and one well-inside-policy certifier case. Reference materials are cited by title and retention metadata only under Mode B: FY26 Q1 independence summary memo and CLEAR recommendation retained under AICPA_SQMS_7Y, FY26 Q2 independence register retained under AICPA_SQMS_7Y, and Independence Checklist v2 retained under FIRM_INTERNAL. No accounting-system updates or source-record writes are authorized from this meeting.

title: FY26 Q2 document retention control sweep kickoff
description: Quarterly kickoff to begin the next document retention control sweep on the standard cadence and confirm sample timing, ownership, and memo deadline.

title: Northstar Legal annual planning workshop: prior-year partner distribution JEs review
description: Annual planning workshop to review prior-year partner distribution journal entries from FP-2025-07, FP-2025-08, and FP-2025-09, using JE-northstar_legal-FP-2025-07-0014 as the anchor reference. The session will produce planning recommendations for Northstar Legal ahead of the 2026-06-30 fiscal year-end.

title: Northstar Legal follow-up workshop: June distribution timing and split convention review
description: Follow-up working session to pressure-test the June distribution timing window created by the Schmidt retirement special and Q4 cadence shift. The group will also tee up the standing 260000 and 519000 split convention discussion before any implementation steps are taken.
